title: catCG2AFM: Transforming AFM row images into coarse-grained models of membrane protein assemblies.
author: Duneau, Jean-Pierre
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Given input 2D coordinates of membrane proteins—obtained from an AFM micrograph—the program uses a trajectory from a coarse-grained (MARTINI) molecular dynamics simulation to assemble a 2D array representing the membrane protein system. Each protein retains its surrounding shell of interacting lipids, with basic handling of steric clashes to ensure realistic spatial organization.
steps_raw: Given input 2D coordinates of membrane proteins—obtained from an AFM micrograph—the program uses a trajectory from a coarse-grained (MARTINI) molecular dynamics simulation to assemble a 2D array representing the membrane protein system. Each protein retains its surrounding shell of interacting lipids, with basic handling of steric clashes to ensure realistic spatial organization.
